MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF COLLEEN BRYNE MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT (to add new causes of action), AND MOTION TO PLEAD PUNITIVE DAMAGES AGAINST MEDICAL PROVIDER:
APPEARANCE: David S. Rosenberg, Esq. 510/482-2486 for pltf & moving party; Randy Andrada, Esq. of Andrada & Schanzenbach, LLP 510/287-4160 for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Deny motion to plead punitive damages (as per CCP 425.13); re motion to amend complaint - "permit amended complaint subject to discovery being re-opened limited to asking questions re new causes of action." Pltf to file amended complaint today. Deft to file response on or before 06/30/04. Pltf to prepare order. (302/REQ/JL-EX) Court Reporter Carol A. Karen, CSR #8189
